properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There must be a God I believe it's true Cause I can see His love, when I look at you And He must have a plan for this crazy life Because He brought you here and place you by my side And I have never been so sure of anything before

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Like I am in this moment here with you Now for better or for worse Are so much more than only words And I pray everyday will be the proof That I mean what I say when I say I do Yeah I mean what I say when I say I do

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You see these hands you hold, will always hold you up When the strength you have just ain't strong enough And what tomorrow brings only time will tell But I will stand by you in sickness and in health Cause I have never been so sure of anything before

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Take my hand and take this ring And know that I will always love you through anything As the years march on like a beating heart I will live these words "til death do us part" Cause I have never been so sure of anything before
